allow: Bash(python -c "import sqlite3; conn = sqlite3.connect\('students.db'\); cursor = conn.cursor\(\); cursor.execute\(\\"SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table'\\"\); print\('Tables:', cursor.fetchall\(\)\); cursor.execute\('PRAGMA table_info\(students\)'\); print\('Schema:', cursor.fetchall\(\)\); cursor.execute\('SELECT * FROM students LIMIT 3'\); print\('Sample:', cursor.fetchall\(\)\); conn.close\(\)")
